transition_log.note: Confirmed decisions.md (all 4 decisions: thin-cache AgentStore, agent-mcp owns runtime composed_prompts table, systemPrompt compat-shim retained-as-computed, claudecli allowedBuiltinTools derives from composed.tools/AGENT_TOOL). Verified _shared.md caller map against live src tree: all callers confirmed in correct state buckets; found session.ts also imports AgentStore for agentTool.read() — consistent with agent-store-retire ownership. Added @nx/vite:test executor to project.json so guard --testFile flag is accepted. Guard test: 8 tests, reopen roundtrip proven by close+reopen on-disk path, exit 0. Full agent-mcp suite: 210 passed / 0 failures, exit 0. nx build agent-mcp: clean.

validation/agent.ts: systemPrompt z.string() → z.string().optional() with compat-shim JSDoc (grep_absent satisfied). domain.ts: AgentDefinition.systemPrompt: string → systemPrompt?: string with compat-shim JSDoc. agent-store.ts: JSDoc documents thin-cache role. agent-cache-store.test.ts: 8 tests prove create-without-prompt, compat-shim persistence, reopen invariant. Implemented: PolicyEngine.check() reads rate (max_recursion_depth/max_tool_loops) and permission (allowlist) limits from @adhd/agent-policy template rules when policyTemplateRules is supplied, falling back to PolicyConfig defaults when absent. ClaudeCliProvider reconciled: compiledTools (AGENT_TOOL model string[] from compileAgent({platform:claude_code}).tools) constructor param wins over config.allowedBuiltinTools when supplied [inv:no-third-tool-model]. validation/agent.ts claudecliProviderSchema allowedBuiltinTools doc updated to reference AGENT_TOOL model. Added @adhd/agent-policy to package.json deps. New test: 9 tests across 3 describe blocks prove template-limit override + fallback + per-agent precedence + compiled-tools/allowedBuiltinTools reconciliation with negative controls.
